message:
chore(beads): Close bd-3kmf - Feature: ntm send --batch (explicit sequence)

Implementation complete:
- Added batchAction type for interactive error handling choices
- Added promptBatchAction for pause/continue/skip on errors
- Added filterPanesForBatch for agent type (--cc/--cod/--gmi) and tag filtering
- Added graceful Ctrl+C handling with summary on interrupt
- All tests pass, UBS clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
